parents.subject: LU-10296 obdclass: no errors on missing o_cleanup

commit.subject: LU-10339 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.92-6.30]
commit.message:
LU-10339 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.92-6.30]

Update target and kernel_config files for new version

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=sles12sp3 testgroup=review-ldiskfs \
  mdsdistro=sles12sp3 ossdistro=sles12sp3 \
  mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs

Change-Id: I3da56f755cc3200bf3e6a7cbf6ee2e2b0d6afbb8
Signed-off-by: Bob Glossman <bob.glossman@intel.com>
